H t f ) " ^ t e ^ 7 3ik^K'3Tcl: T*TT^mfe^^TTTTl; (13 ) W T T 1 %, 3flTf^HFT 3 " fa& 3T^T?T ^ % t f ^ T*TS " ^ K f % ^ T C ^ ' ' (ftra% 3TTFfa 3TmiTder yi^Pd* TZZ Mt t ) ' ' ^ 3 3 i " 3TR 7TC 3TcT: ^JTfafl fa^ •^SfTWT; •vff t") " * M * # f WZ, m- WTf^RT 1^TT -^TFTTT; f W TJ ?/2/?001 -TWJTfn)! -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SLC. 3 (i)J ( i ) m ^ T . f t . 1497 f^TTO 27ftrcTWR,1976 (ii) *JT.*FT.fT. 553 f^tto1 18 3tfcT, 1978 (iii) m^T.ft. 1033(3?) f^m 31 feZMl, 1987 (iv) TOJT.tX 716(51) f^TT^ 20 ^T, 1988 (v) ^i.-eFi.-Pr. 561(3,) fairer 5 *[sn£ 1994 MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Cominerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th December, 2001 G.S.R. 897(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 25 of the Rubber Act, 1947 (XXIV of 1947) the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Rubber Rules, 1955, namely:— 1.(1) These rules may be called the Rubber (Amendment) Rules, 2001. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette, 2, In the Rubber Rules, 1955 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules),— (a) in rule 39, in sub-rule (1), after the words "otherwise deal in rubber", the brackets and words "(including imported natural rubber)" shall be inserted; (b) in rule 39A, in sub-rule (1), after the words "to acquire rubber", the brackets and words "(including imported natural rubber)" shall be inserted; (c) in rule 40, after the words "otherwise acquire rubber", the brackets and words "(including imported natural rubber)" shall be inserted; (d) for rule 48, the following rule shall be substituted, namely :— "48. Grading and Marketing of rubber.—Every processor and every person referred to in rule 39A shall grade and market his products in conformity with such standards as are specified by the Bureau of Indian Standards from time to time"; 3. In the First Schedule to the said rules,— (a) in Form C, in the opening portion, after the words, "otherwise acquire rubber", the brackets and words "(including imported natural rubber)" shall be inserted; (b) in Form C 1, in the opening portion, after the words "otherwise acquire rubber", the brackets and words" "(including imported natural rubber)", shall be inserted; (c) in Form E, in the opening portion, after the words "quantities of rubber", the brackets and words "(including imported natural rubber)", shall be inserted. [F. No. 2/2/2001-Plant(C)] L.V. SAPTHARISHI, Addl. Secy. Foot note:— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) Part II, Section3; Page 1,613, dated 1st August, 1955 and subsequently amended which has been published vide (i) G.S.R. 1497 dated 27th September, 1976. (ii) G.S.R. 553 dated 18th April, 1978. (iii) G.S.R. 1033(E) dated 31st December, 1987. (iv) G.S.R. 716(E) dated 20th June, 1988. (v) G.S.R. 561(E) dated 5th July, 1994.
